visual_description: The audio opens with a low, suspenseful, and slightly melancholic instrumental score, creating a tense and serious atmosphere. A man with dark hair, wearing a light-colored collared shirt and dark pants, is shown from the side in a dimly lit room. He is looking down and to his right, seemingly focused on something out of frame. The background consists of a wall with horizontal blinds, and the overall lighting is low, casting the man in shadow. In the top left corner of the screen, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera remains stationary, holding a medium shot of the man. The sound of footsteps on a hard floor is heard as a man walks into a room. The man walks from the right side of the frame towards the left. The camera pans slightly to follow his movement. The room is revealed to be an office, with a desk and a computer monitor visible in the background. The man continues walking past the desk, and the camera pans further left, following him. The office is cluttered, with papers and maps pinned to the wall behind him. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The man walks towards a woman sitting at a desk.
